# Rounak Arora — Digital Growth Expert (Jaipur, India)
> Digital marketer and content creator based in Jaipur, India, specializing in Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO, Social Media Marketing, and Website Design. 3+ years of experience, 100K+ followers managed, 25M+ views generated across platforms.

## About
Rounak Arora is a digital marketing professional based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. He helps businesses grow through performance marketing (Meta Ads, Google Ads), SEO/AEO/GEO, social media management, and premium website design. He also founded and runs Gulabi Nagari, a Jaipur-focused lifestyle and news platform with 30K+ followers.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://rounakarora.online/): Overview of services, results, and testimonials.
- [About](https://rounakarora.online/about.html): Background, experience, education, and certifications.
- [Services](https://rounakarora.online/services.html): Full list of digital marketing services offered, including FAQs.
- [Results](https://rounakarora.online/results.html): Portfolio, case studies, and measurable outcomes for past clients.
- [Contact](https://rounakarora.online/contact.html): How to get in touch or book a consultation.

## Services Offered
Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram advertising), Google Ads, SEO (Search Engine Optimization), Social Media Marketing, Website Design & Development, E-Commerce Growth, Branding, Content Creation (reels, product shoots, brand content).
